'''damala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiocontrol|enantiocontrol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiocontrol|enantiocontrol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| damala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæmælæth|dæmælæth]] || [[word:dæmælæj|dæmælæj]] || [[word:dæmælæsh|dæmælæsh]] || [[word:dæmælæ|dæmælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:damamalath|damamalath]] || [[word:damamalaj|damamalaj]] || [[word:damamalash|damamalash]] || [[word:damamala|damamala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:damalath|damalath]] || [[word:damalaj|damalaj]] || [[word:damalash|damalash]] || [[word:damala|damala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:damaflath|damaflath]] || [[word:damaflaj|damaflaj]] || [[word:damaflash|damaflash]] || [[word:damaflaf|damaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:damalatha|damalatha]] || [[word:damalaja|damalaja]] || [[word:damalasha|damalasha]] || [[word:damalaka|damalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:damalath|damalath]] || [[word:damalaj|damalaj]] || [[word:damalash|damalash]] || [[word:damala|damala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:damalathal|damalathal]] || [[word:damalajal|damalajal]] || [[word:damalashal|damalashal]] || [[word:damalakal|damalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:damalathatha|damalathatha]] || [[word:damalajaja|damalajaja]] || [[word:damalashasha|damalashasha]] || [[word:damalaka|damalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:damalathan|damalathan]] || [[word:damalajan|damalajan]] || [[word:damalashan|damalashan]] || [[word:damalakan|damalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:damalathaoro|damalathaoro]] || [[word:damalajaoro|damalajaoro]] || [[word:damalashaoro|damalashaoro]] || [[word:damalakaoro|damalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
